restaurants.name: Cafe Troisieme Marche
restaurants.ambience: Cozy café with relaxed, artistic vibe

attractions.name: Lake Kawaguchiko
attractions.description: The calm waters mirror Mt. Fuji's snow-capped peak, creating one of Japan's most photographed landscapes

attractions.name: Chureito Pagoda
attractions.description: Most photographed Fuji viewpoint with red pagoda foreground and Mount Fuji backdrop

attractions.name: Oishi Park
attractions.description: A perfectly curated viewpoint with flower beds in the foreground and Mt. Fuji rising dramatically in the background — one of the best photo spots in the region

attractions.name: Lake Yamanaka
attractions.description: The largest of the Fuji Five Lakes — quieter and more expansive. Known for wide open landscapes, swan sightings, and peaceful, uncrowded atmosphere

attractions.name: Arakurayama Sengen Park
attractions.description: Famous for the Chureito Pagoda with Mt. Fuji in the background — one of Japan's most iconic postcard views. Requires climbing steps (~10–15 min uphill), but the view is absolutely worth it
